name: Crockpot Hunter's Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet and brown bell pepper, onion, and garlic.
2. Add mushrooms to the skillet and brown if using fresh; set aside.
3. Place the whole chicken into the crockpot.
4. Add seasonings (oregano, basil, thyme, paprika) and vegetables from the skillet to the crockpot, along with the sliced mushrooms.
5. Pour in the wine.
6. Cook until the chicken is done.
7. Remove the chicken to a warmed platter at 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Mix cornstarch, garlic salt, and water in a bowl to form a paste.
9. Stir the paste into the crockpot mixture and cook until slightly thickened and bubbly.
10. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
